title: ?author= filter is substring (LIKE %x%), not exact match
evidence: app.py:90 'SELECT * FROM books WHERE author LIKE ?' with f'%{author_filter}%'
suggestion: Acceptable — spec only asks for an author filter. Consider exact match if precise filtering is desired.

title: PUT requires both title and author (full replace, no partial update)

suggestion: Acceptable for spec. A PATCH-style partial update would be a nice-to-have.
